Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Shape of Inequalities 51 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. Afroman Wins Civil Trial over Use of Police Raid Footage in His Music Videos 362 upvotes, 63 comments
  3. Gluon: Explicit Performance 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Consensus Board Game 53 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Pretraining Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata 80 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 447 upvotes, 125 comments
  7. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 280 upvotes, 75 comments
  8. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 75 upvotes, 16 comments
  9. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 113 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. How many branches can your CPU predict? 92 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 28 upvotes, 6 comments
  13. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 868 upvotes, 413 comments
  14. Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API 31 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 158 upvotes, 69 comments
  16. Ramtrack.eu – RAM Price Intelligence 40 upvotes, 13 comments
  17. Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80 89 upvotes, 37 comments
  18. Juggalo Makeup Blocks Facial Recognition Technology (2019) 161 upvotes, 75 comments
  19. A survey on LLMs for spreadsheet intelligence 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. What if Python was natively distributable? 20 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. LotusNotes 160 upvotes, 86 comments
  22. Astral to Join OpenAI 755 upvotes, 475 comments
  23. Monuses and Heaps 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. US national debt surges past $39 Trillion 21 upvotes, 10 comments
  26. 2% of ICML papers desk rejected because the authors used LLM in their reviews 169 upvotes, 139 comments
  27. World Happiness Report 2026 14 upvotes, 7 comments
  28. Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents 732 upvotes, 875 comments
  29. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 7 upvotes, 6 comments
  30. Gauntlet AI (YC S17): Fly you to Austin, train you in AI, give you $200k+ job 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
